message:
feat: add credit card and email verification warnings to rent-vps

- Added AlertCard warning before provider cards section
- Warns about credit card requirement for signup
- Warns about email verification requirement
- Notes potential identity verification delays for Contabo

Closes bead 6pto

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,6 +58,47 @@ const PROVIDERS: ProviderInfo[] = [ }, ]; +type ScreenshotSpec = { + file: string; + alt: string; + caption: string; +}; + +const SCREENSHOT_BASE = + "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/main/research_screenshots"; + +function screenshotUrl(file: string): string { + return `${SCREENSHOT_BASE}/${file}`; +} + +function ScreenshotFigure({ file, alt, caption }: ScreenshotSpec) { + const src = screenshotUrl(file); + return ( + + ); +} + interface ProviderCardProps { provider: ProviderInfo; isExpanded: boolean; @@ -210,6 +251,24 @@ export default function RentVPSPage() { + {/* Credit card and verification warning */} + +
+

+ Credit card required: Both providers require + a valid credit card for signup. Prepaid cards may not work. +

+

+ Email verification: You'll need to verify + your email address. Check your spam folder if you don't see the verification email. +

+

+ Some providers (especially Contabo) may require additional identity verification for + new accounts. This usually takes a few minutes but can occasionally take up to 24 hours. +

+
+ + {/* Provider cards */}

Recommended providers

@@ -411,11 +470,21 @@ export default function RentVPSPage() { contabo.com/en-us/vps + Look for a plan with 12+ vCPU and 48GB+ RAM (32GB absolute minimum). NVMe storage is standard on all recommended plans. Click "Configure" or "Order". + @@ -427,6 +496,11 @@ export default function RentVPSPage() {

If 25.10 isn't offered, Ubuntu 24.04 LTS is fine — ACFS upgrades to 25.10 automatically.

+ @@ -453,6 +527,58 @@ export default function RentVPSPage() {
+ +
+ + Click on "OVH" above, or go to{" "} + + us.ovhcloud.com/vps + + + + + + We recommend: +
    +
  • VPS-5: 64GB RAM (best for multi-agent work)
    • +
  • VPS-4: 48GB RAM (budget option)
    • +
+ Click "Order" to continue. + + + + + During configuration, look for: +
    +
  • Image/OS: Ubuntu 25.10 (or latest available)
    • +
  • Region: Closest to you (US-East/US-West/EU)
    • +
  • Authentication: Password (skip SSH keys for now)
    • +
+ +

+ If Ubuntu 25.10 isn't available, Ubuntu 24.04 LTS is fine — ACFS upgrades automatically. +

+ + + + OVH will prompt you to create an account and add a payment method. + Once the order completes, activation is usually instant. + +
+ +

When choosing a plan, you'll see terms like vCPU, RAM, and NVMe.
